  <BannerComponent />
  <router-view />

import NavBarComponent from './components/NavBarComponent.vue';

    name: "App",
    components: {
      NavBarComponent,
      BannerComponent,
    },

</script>
<style>
#app {
  font-family: Avenir, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;
  -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;

}

nav {

nav a {
  font-weight: bold;
  color: #2c3e50;
}

nav a.router-link-exact-active {

}
